name: kgateway build-tools
onCreateCommand: sh -ec 'for img in kgateway:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION sds:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION envoy-wrapper:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION dummy-idp:0.0.1 extproc-server:0.0.1; do docker pull "$DEVCONTAINER_IMAGE_REGISTRY/$img" || echo "Warning: failed to pull $img, build it locally with: IMAGE_REGISTRY=$DEVCONTAINER_IMAGE_REGISTRY VERSION=$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION make <target>-docker"; done'
postCreateCommand: make setup-base && sh -ec 'for img in kgateway:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION sds:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION envoy-wrapper:$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION dummy-idp:0.0.1 extproc-server:0.0.1; do full_image="$DEVCONTAINER_IMAGE_REGISTRY/$img"; docker image inspect "$full_image" >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker pull "$full_image" || { echo "Warning: failed to pull $img, skipping kind load"; continue; }; go tool kind load docker-image "$full_image" --name kind || echo "Warning: failed to load $img into kind"; done' && IMAGE_REGISTRY=$DEVCONTAINER_IMAGE_REGISTRY VERSION=$DEVCONTAINER_VERSION make package-kgateway-charts
